problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
